subject: Project Management
title: The Suez Canal
description: Learn The Suez Canal in one minute.

hook.text: The Suez Canal cut the sea route from Europe to Asia by 7,000 km — a 10-year mega-project.

buildup.text: French diplomat Ferdinand de Lesseps convinced Egypt's ruler to back the canal in 1859.

discovery.text: Forced labor built the early sections. Over 120,000 Egyptian workers dug by hand.

twist.text: Britain opposed the canal at first, then bought Egypt's shares in a secret overnight deal.

climax.text: The canal opened in 1869 and immediately reshaped global trade and geopolitics.

punchline.text: One ditch redrew the map of world commerce.

quiz.question: How much did the Suez Canal shorten the sea route from Europe to Asia?
